author: asmeurer
text: Checks for required sections in docstrings

author: asmeurer
text:
In the guide [@lglattly](https://github.com/lglattly) is working on, the "purpose" and "examples" sections will be required in all docstrings ("purpose" is just the first sentence at the top of the docstring, which doesn't have an explicit header). We need a check for the tests that makes sure every docstring has this, so that we can enforce it in pull requests.

CC @sympy/gsod

author: asmeurer
text: added to milestone: Docstring Style Guide
